note: Phase 1 + free quote_authenticity: honest agent VERIFIED against the OFFICIAL Phala dstack simulator with ALL SIX checks passing. quote_authenticity validates the real Intel SGX PCK chain to the Intel Root CA (free, offline). The one guarantee real hardware still adds: the quote-body ECDSA signature over report_data (the simulator patches report_data in after capture). Set PHALA_VERIFY_URL on real TDX for full DCAP.

payload.notes: The transaction details are clear, specific, and consistent with a standard professional payment.
